__un_used_tip__: The permission part of this language file is manually translated, the rest are automatically collected strings from the source code, there may be some issues, please bear with us.
allowMinecartHopperPullItems: Allow Minecart Hopper to Pull Items
useFurnaces: Allow Using All Furnace-like Blocks (Furnace/Blast Furnace/Smoker)
allowPlayerPickupItem: Allow Players to Pick Up Items
allowFishingRodAndHook: Allow Using Fishing Rod and Hook
useContainer: Allow Using Containers (Chest/Barrel/Shulker Box/Dispenser/Dropper/Hopper/Chiseled Bookshelf/Trial Vault/...)

将在当前领地内划出一个新的子领地\n\n子领地将成为独立领地：\n• 位于当前领:
A new child land will be created within the current land

Child land will become an independent land:
• Located within the current land
• Completely independent permissions (like a concession)
Continue?
选区功能已开启，使用命令 /pland set 或使用 {} 来选择ab点: Selection mode activated, use command /pland set or use {} to select points A and B
重新选区为完全重新选择领地的范围，非直接扩充/缩小现有领地范围。\n重新选择的价:
Reselecting area means completely reselecting the land area, not directly expanding/shrinking the existing land area.
The price for reselection is calculated as "New Area Price - Old Area Value". Continue?
您确定要添加 {} 为领地成员吗?: Are you sure you want to add {} as a land member?
您确定要移除成员 \"{}\" 吗?: Are you sure you want to remove member "{}"?
